commands.review_summary:
This PR redacts secret-shaped foreground/background exec, process poll/log/list/control, live-update, and node-host tool-result text/details before returning them to agents.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns raw foreground exec aggregated output, process poll/log/list output, command-derived names, and live-update tails through tool-result text/details. I did not run a live repro because this review is read-only.
